existing_features.title: Make the Navigation component fully responsive: the desktop nav links and CTA buttons should collapse into a hamburger/mobile menu on small screens, ensuring touch targets are large enough and the menu opens/closes smoothly.

Make the HeroSection responsive: headline text, service badges, action buttons, and the embedded QuickEstimateForm must stack vertically and scale correctly on mobile screens without overflow or truncation.

Make the ServicesSection and ServiceCard components responsive: the service card grid should switch from multi-column to a single-column or two-column layout on small screens, with readable text and accessible buttons.

Make the ProductCatalogSection and ProductCard components responsive: the product grid, search input, category filter bar, and InquiryBasket must all be usable on small screens without horizontal scrolling.

Make the GallerySection and ImageLightbox responsive: gallery thumbnails should reflow to fewer columns on mobile, and the lightbox should be full-screen with accessible prev/next controls on touch devices.
Make the PricingSection and PricingCard components responsive: the three-column pricing grid must stack to a single column on mobile with full-width cards.

Make the ContractorZoneSection, ContractorInquiryForm, PremiumQuoteBuilder, SiteVisitBookingForm, and ContactSection responsive: all forms must have full-width inputs on mobile, proper label spacing, and submit buttons that are easy to tap.
Make the Footer responsive: footer columns (company info, contact details, quick links, social icons) should stack vertically on mobile and render as a multi-column grid on tablet and desktop.

Make the AdminPanel responsive: the tabbed interface, product management table/list, and business settings form must be usable on mobile screens, with inputs and buttons accessible without horizontal scrolling.
Ensure the FloatingWhatsAppButton does not overlap important content on mobile; reposition or resize it as needed so it does not block bottom navigation or form submit buttons.

new_feature_requests.summary: Make the app mobile friendly / responsive
